allow: Bash(npm --version)
Bash(npm install *)
Bash(npx tsc *)
Bash(npm run *)
Bash(npx vitest *)
Bash(gh repo *)
Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}\\n" https://github.com/kpsolo/callflow)
Bash(curl -s https://api.github.com/repos/kpsolo/callflow)
Bash(curl -s -I https://github.com/kpsolo/callflow.git)
Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "redirected to: %{redirect_url}\\nfinal http: %{http_code}\\n" -L https://github.com/kpsolo/callflow)
Bash(git ls-tree *)
Bash(git checkout *)
Bash(git add *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat\(palette\): filter by entity type \(demote off-pattern items\) *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat\(canvas\): anchor ROOT visually with START chip + dagre upper-left align *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat\(fixtures\): splitFanIn de-clutters terminals with many inbound edges *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat\(canvas\): edge styling vocabulary + distinct inactive style *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat\(inspector\): redesign menu actions editor + cross-pane highlight *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat\(topbar\): reorganize — sim button + validation pill + save status + overflow *)
Bash(git commit -m 'polish: WCAG header contrast, minimap colors, dismissible hints, inspector chip *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat\(inspector\): tab menu node settings into General/Prompts/Actions/Errors *)
Bash(git commit --allow-empty -m 'chore: UX pass summary *)
Bash(git push *)
Bash(git commit -m 'perf\(build\): split vendor chunks \(reactflow, dagre, zod, zustand, react\) *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat\(store\): bidirectional menu-action <-> canvas-edge sync *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat\(action_nop\): Do Nothing action — explicitly inert key on a menu *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat\(presence\): minimal user-presence placeholder in top bar \(P5-10\) *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat\(api\): CollabClient interface + LocalStorageClient implementation *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat\(collab\): identity, lock indicator, multi-tab presence in top bar *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat\(comments\): anchored comments on nodes + per-node badge + Inspector section *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feat\(activity\): structural-change recorder + log viewer *)
Bash(git commit -m 'docs\(collaboration\): architecture, default backend, swap-in guide *)
